vehicles.slot: Cap near selector base on console — Lexus may place release INSIDE center console storage bin
shift: Turn ignition to ON.
Locate the shift lock slot: Cap near selector base on console — Lexus may place release INSIDE center console storage bin.
Insert a thin key or flathead into the slot and press firmly down.
While holding the slot, press the brake pedal.
Move the selector to Neutral.
neutral: Apply parking brake.
Connect jump pack to battery — Under hood.
Once 12V power is restored, press brake and shift to N normally.
If using slot without power, apply consistent firm pressure — hybrid selectors may require more force.
Hybrid: 12V auxiliary only — never touch HV battery.
vehicles.notes: Shift lock may be inside console storage bin.
vehicles.towMethod: FWD: lift from front — front (drive) wheels in the air. AWD: flatbed only. AWD without flatbed: wheel-lift with dollies on opposite axle. Wheel-lift max: 35 mph, 50 miles — flatbed preferred for longer distances.
towNotes: HYBRID/PHEV: Use 12V auxiliary battery ONLY for jumping. NEVER access the high-voltage battery pack.
FWD: lift from front (front/drive wheels in the air) freely. If rear-lift is not possible, place wheel dollies under the REAR wheels and tow front-first.

battery.jumpTerminals: Under hood — standard terminals. Hybrid: 12V only.

vehicles.slot: Cap near selector base — may be inside center console storage on some years
shift: Turn ignition to ON.
Locate the shift lock slot: Cap near selector base — may be inside center console storage on some years.
Insert a thin key or flathead into the slot and press firmly down.
While holding the slot, press the brake pedal.
Move the selector to Neutral.
neutral: Apply parking brake.
Connect jump pack to battery — Under hood.
Once 12V power is restored, press brake and shift to N normally.
If using slot without power, apply consistent firm pressure — hybrid selectors may require more force.
Hybrid: 12V auxiliary only — never touch HV battery.
vehicles.towMethod: FWD: lift from front — front (drive) wheels in the air. AWD/Hybrid: flatbed only. AWD without flatbed: wheel-lift with dollies on opposite axle. Wheel-lift max: 35 mph, 50 miles — flatbed preferred for longer distances.
towNotes: HYBRID/PHEV: Use 12V auxiliary battery ONLY for jumping. NEVER access the high-voltage battery pack.
FWD: lift from front (front/drive wheels in the air) freely. If rear-lift is not possible, place wheel dollies under the REAR wheels and tow front-first.

battery.jumpTerminals: Under hood — standard terminals. Hybrid: 12V only.

vehicles.slot: Cap near selector base on console
shift: Turn ignition to ON (do not start engine).
Locate the shift lock release: Cap near selector base on console.
Pry off the cap or cover if present using your ignition key or a small flathead.
Insert the key (or a thin flathead) into the slot and press firmly downward.
While holding the slot, press the brake pedal.
Move the selector from Park to Neutral.
Remove key from slot and replace cap.
neutral: Apply parking brake and chock wheels.
Connect jump pack to battery — Under hood or in trunk — varies by generation.
Once 12V power is restored, press brake and shift to Neutral normally.
If power cannot be restored, use the shift lock slot above — Cap near selector base on console.
vehicles.notes: IS-F: manual — clutch to N. AWD optional.
vehicles.towMethod: RWD: lift from rear — rear (drive) wheels in the air. AWD: flatbed only. AWD without flatbed: wheel-lift with dollies on opposite axle. Wheel-lift max: 35 mph, 50 miles — flatbed preferred for longer distances.
towNotes: MANUAL TRANSMISSION OPTION: If equipped with manual trans, no shift lock — depress clutch and select Neutral. No override slot needed.

battery.location: Under hood or in trunk — varies by generation
battery.jumpTerminals: Under hood: fused terminal (+), ground bolt (−)

vehicles.slot: Cap near selector base on console
shift: Turn ignition to ON (do not start engine).
Locate the shift lock release: Cap near selector base on console.
Pry off the cap or cover if present using your ignition key or a small flathead.
Insert the key (or a thin flathead) into the slot and press firmly downward.
While holding the slot, press the brake pedal.
Move the selector from Park to Neutral.
Remove key from slot and replace cap.
neutral: Apply parking brake and chock wheels.
Connect jump pack to battery — Under hood.
Once 12V power is restored, press brake and shift to Neutral normally.
If power cannot be restored, use the shift lock slot above — Cap near selector base on console.
vehicles.towMethod: Transfer case to H2 (2WD) first, then lift from rear — rear (drive) wheels in the air, or flatbed. Wheel-lift max: 35 mph, 50 miles — flatbed preferred for longer distances.

tc.type: Electric push-button on dash — H2 / H4 / L4
positions: H2 — 2WD rear wheels only — REQUIRED for road towing
L4 — 4WD low range — NEVER tow in this position on road
steps: Press the H2 button on the dash.
Confirm the H2 indicator lamp illuminates.
Safe to lift rear wheels once confirmed in H2.
Shift back to H4 after towing is complete.
IF BATTERY IS DEAD: Jump battery first to power electronic TC, shift to 2WD, then disconnect. If unable to shift, FLATBED ONLY.

towNotes: ELECTRONIC TRANSFER CASE: Requires 12V power to shift. If battery is dead, jump the battery FIRST, then shift TC to 2WD before disconnecting.
DEAD BATTERY FALLBACK: If TC cannot be shifted to 2WD, USE FLATBED. Do NOT tow with TC in 4WD/4H/4L — will destroy transfer case and driveline.
4WD DOLLY FALLBACK: If transfer case CANNOT be shifted to 2WD (dead battery, mechanical failure), either use flatbed OR wheel-lift with dollies on the opposite axle.

knownIssues.title: Kinetic Dynamic Suspension System (KDSS)
knownIssues.detail: Some GX 460 trims have KDSS (hydraulic stabilizer bar disconnect). This system can behave unexpectedly when the vehicle is lifted. Be aware that suspension geometry may shift more than expected when lifting one end.

battery.warnings: KDSS equipped trims: suspension may shift when lifted.

shift: Turn ignition to ON (do not start engine).
Locate the shift lock release: Cap near selector base on console.
Pry off the cap or cover if present using your ignition key or a small flathead.
Insert the key (or a thin flathead) into the slot and press firmly downward.
While holding the slot, press the brake pedal.

Remove key from slot and replace cap.
neutral: Apply parking brake and chock wheels.

vehicles.towMethod: Transfer case to H2 (2WD) first, then lift from rear — rear (drive) wheels in the air, or flatbed. Wheel-lift max: 35 mph, 50 miles — flatbed preferred for longer distances.

tc.type: Electric push-button on dash — H2 / H4 / L4
positions: H2 — 2WD rear wheels only — REQUIRED for road towing
L4 — 4WD low range — NEVER tow in this position on road
steps: Press the H2 button on the dash.
Safe to lift rear wheels in H2.
IF BATTERY IS DEAD: Jump battery first to power electronic TC, shift to 2WD, then disconnect. If unable to shift, FLATBED ONLY.

towNotes: ELECTRONIC TRANSFER CASE: Requires 12V power to shift. If battery is dead, jump the battery FIRST, then shift TC to 2WD before disconnecting.
DEAD BATTERY FALLBACK: If TC cannot be shifted to 2WD, USE FLATBED. Do NOT tow with TC in 4WD/4H/4L — will destroy transfer case and driveline.
4WD DOLLY FALLBACK: If transfer case CANNOT be shifted to 2WD (dead battery, mechanical failure), either use flatbed OR wheel-lift with dollies on the opposite axle.

knownIssues.title: Air Suspension May Drop Without Power
knownIssues.detail: LX air suspension will lower to the bump stops when power is lost for extended periods. Restore 12V power before attempting flatbed load if possible. Otherwise check clearance carefully before approaching with ramp.

knownIssues.title: Very Heavy Vehicle
knownIssues.detail: LX 570/600 curb weight is approximately 6,000 lbs. Verify all equipment weight ratings before attempting to lift or load.

battery.warnings: Air suspension drops with dead battery. Very heavy vehicle (~6,000 lbs). Restore power before loading.

shift: Turn ignition to ON.
Locate the shift lock slot: Cap near selector base.
Insert a thin key or flathead into the slot and press firmly down.
While holding the slot, press the brake pedal.
Move the selector to Neutral.
neutral: Apply parking brake.
Connect jump pack to battery — Under hood.
Once 12V power is restored, press brake and shift to N normally.
If using slot without power, apply consistent firm pressure — hybrid selectors may require more force.
Hybrid: 12V auxiliary only — never touch HV battery.
vehicles.towMethod: FWD: lift from front — front (drive) wheels in the air. AWD/Hybrid/PHEV: flatbed only. AWD without flatbed: wheel-lift with dollies on opposite axle. Wheel-lift max: 35 mph, 50 miles — flatbed preferred for longer distances.
towNotes: HYBRID/PHEV: Use 12V auxiliary battery ONLY for jumping. NEVER access the high-voltage battery pack.
FWD: lift from front (front/drive wheels in the air) freely. If rear-lift is not possible, place wheel dollies under the REAR wheels and tow front-first.

battery.jumpTerminals: Under hood — standard terminals. Hybrid/PHEV: 12V only.

vehicles.slot: Cap near selector base or inside center console storage
shift: Turn ignition to ON (do not start engine).
Locate the shift lock release: Cap near selector base or inside center console storage.
Pry off the cap or cover if present using your ignition key or a small flathead.
Insert the key (or a thin flathead) into the slot and press firmly downward.
While holding the slot, press the brake pedal.
Move the selector from Park to Neutral.
Remove key from slot and replace cap.
neutral: Apply parking brake and chock wheels.
Battery is under the rear seat — but use the jump terminals UNDER THE HOOD to connect your jump pack. Use an AGM-compatible jump pack — this vehicle has an AGM battery.
Once 12V power is restored, press brake and shift to Neutral normally.
If power cannot be restored, use the shift lock slot above — Cap near selector base or inside center console storage.
vehicles.towMethod: RWD: lift from rear — rear (drive) wheels in the air. AWD/Hybrid: flatbed only. AWD without flatbed: wheel-lift with dollies on opposite axle. Wheel-lift max: 35 mph, 50 miles — flatbed preferred for longer distances.
towNotes: HYBRID/PHEV: Use 12V auxiliary battery ONLY for jumping. NEVER access the high-voltage battery pack.
AIR SUSPENSION: May lower/raise unexpectedly. Verify ride height is stable before loading on flatbed. Some models have a 'jack mode' or 'transport mode' — check with owner if possible.

battery.location: Under hood or under rear seat — varies by generation
battery.jumpTerminals: Under hood: fused jump terminal (+), ground bolt (−)
battery.warnings: Air suspension drops with dead battery. Hybrid: 12V only. Use hood terminals.
